dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.remark: From the strong shoulders to the gentle flaring all the way to the knee-skimming length, this ensemble revisits and renders homage to iconic 1930s and ‘40s Hollywood and Cinecittà (a.k.a. Hollywood on the Tiber) glamour. The silver fox with alpaca intarsiawork makes for a wonderfully light & fluffy sensation.
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.description: Coat with round neckline and wide ¾ sleeves. Soft A line, knee length. Dress crewneck tube style with short wide sleeves. Above-the-knee length. Upper section in black velvet, with essential horizontal cut across top of bustline; main section in gray melange wool flannel with six-part vertical construction.

dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.remark: Si denota il fascino di Ferré per il Romanticismo sensuale e misterioso dell’Ottocento. Reso noto dal disegno del ricamo con un motivo ad ampie volute che riprendono moduli organici e scultorei che si sommano in un vortice roteante e sospeso, generando forme che plasmano il cappotto di lana.
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.acquisition:
Acquisto asta Il Ponte novembre 2022
Open Care, Stand 32
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.description: Cappotto lunghezza al ginocchio, maniche a kimono tagliate, girocollo, chiusura con due bottoni rivestiti, foderato in crêpe de chine. Il capo è costruito da 5 teli cuciti ad intarsio tra loro, seguendo il motivo a volute. Il capo è completamente ricamato con fili diversi. I motivi a volute disegnano anche i davanti, il fondo del cappotto e il fondo maniche. Ulteriormente ricamato con fori che seguono il disegno.
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.source: Cartella stampa, Collezione Alta Moda Autunno-Inverno 1988/89
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.label: Alta Moda d’oro
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.working_process: Ricamo a mano, in filo di lana grigio mélange, nero e filo di seta grigio perla; traforature su tutto il capo rinforzate con filato grigio; cuciture a intarsio.
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.materials: Lana mohair ricamata (Agnona, art.12517, var.M65), crêpe de chine grigio scuro.

dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.remark: The embroidery on the jacket – where the gracious reference to Pompier art is clear – sparks fond memories of the European salon lifestyle of the late 19th century. Drapery type tassles & cords define the ornamentation on an item essentially modern of cut, while also creating a sense of contrast with the (equally simple of shape) snakeskin skirt. The latter is precious in an aggressive way, thanks to the use of high-tech processes in delineating a new narrative for the basic material.

dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.remark: La definizione formale di grande rigore del completo si oppone ed allo stesso tempo si compenetra dello sfarzo derivato dai colori caldi, ma soprattutto dal ricorso, volutamente opulento, ai motivi paisley: questi sono divenuti di gran moda in Occidente a partire dal secolo XIX, quando il fascino esercitato dal gusto decorativo orientale-subcontinentale indiano, in special modo, coincide cronologicamente con l’introduzione dei telai jacquard in area inglese e scozzese.
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.description: Giacca girocollo, senza chiusure; maniche lunghe; linea asciutta; lunghezza ai fianchi. Il tessuto di lana jacquard a disegno paisley è piazzato a scialli. I colori di base di tessitura sono bruciato, bordeaux,ocra e marrone. Il nero è creato da un sovraricamo a mano a punto catenella. Profilo davanti in zibellino tinto bordeaux. Gonna a vita alta, molto aderente; lunghezza al ginocchio. Materiale e ricamo come la giacca. Camicia di linea diritta, con chiusura posteriore, in raso di seta bordeaux, con piccolo colletto a punta stondata, sostenuto da un’alta pistagna. Cache col ad effetto drappeggio irregolare, ottenuto con passaggi di fili che trattengono dall’interno il tessuto. Scialle quadrato con corta sfrangiatura ai lati.
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (scritta oro)
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.exhibitions: “Cachemire. Il Segno in movimento”, Fondazione Antonio Ratti, Villa Sucota/Como e Villa Bernasconi/Cernobbio, 2016
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.working_process: Ricamo a mano, punto catenella in filo nero, piazzato su disegno paisley jacquard.
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.materials: Lana jacquard a disegno cachemire (Etro, Milano art. 639 var. 4); raso di seta (Clerici Tessuto, Como art. 801 var. 874); zibellino (Montorsi,Bologna).

dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.remark: Here too the prime point of interest is the use of intarsiawork silk foulard complete with embroidery for the external layer of the skirt.
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.description: Ballgown skirt in voluminous floor length. Exterior layer in six silk print foulards, joined together intarsia mode to form an uninterrupted pattern. Underneath, multiple circular black plisse tulle petticoats (each lifted in front and attached to waist) with lace ribbon trim. Belt in fabric with matching buckle. Top in black silk velvet. Short slim line. Spaghetti straps & piping in black tubular silk. Shawl in silk organza with partial paisley print plus lavish paillette/jet embroidery. Boxy shape.

dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.working_process: Ricamo a mano, punto catenella in filo nero, piazzato su disegno paisley jacquard.
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.materials: Lana jacquard a disegno cachemire (Etro, Milano art. 639 var. 4); raso di seta (Clerici Tessuto, Como art. 801 var. 874); zibellino (Montorsi,Bologna).

dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.remark: Di taglio squisitamente maschile e austero: un severo chesterfield monopetto. Il completo risulta decisamente femminilizzato dal cache- col mosso ed enfatizzato dal drappeggio, dalla calda sensualità delle tonalità, dalla raffinatezza dei sovraricami e dai macro-motivi, ricorrenti anche nei tessuti da arredamento del secondo scorcio del XIX secolo.
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.description: Cappotto di taglio maschile, dalla linea asciutta; monopetto a due bottoni; revers a lancia; lunghezza al ginocchio. Il tessuto di lana jacquard a disegno paisley è piazzato a scialli. I colori di base di tessitura sono bruciato, bordeaux, ocra e marrone. Il nero è creato da un sovraricamo a mano a punto catenella. Camicia di linea diritta, con chiusura posteriore, in raso di seta bordeaux, con piccolo colletto a punta stondata, sostenuto da una alta pistagna. Gonna di linea asciutta; lunghezza al ginocchio; realizzata con 8 teli verticali in panno di lana nero; apertura con zip sul dietro. Cache-col ad effetto drappeggio irregolare, ottenuto con passaggi di fili che trattengono dall’interno il tessuto.

dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.remark: All’asciuttezza della linea della giacca-blazer fanno da contrasto sia le maniche dalla lunghezza esasperata, che necessariamente genera arricciature, sia l’ampiezza dei pantaloni, sostanzialmente estranea ai canoni occidentali. Il motivo paisley, comune a giacca, pantaloni e scialle, assume luci diverse a causa di materiali e lavorazioni diverse nei tre pezzi.
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.description: Giacca di taglio maschile, monopetto a un bottone; revers a lancia;linea asciutta; lunghezza al fianco; maniche molto lunghe da tenere arricciate. Il capo è in raso di lana e seta stampato a disegno paisley, piazzato a foulard con cornice in tinta unita nera. Colori: bruciato, ocra,bordeaux, rosso e nero. Canotta di linea diritta in raso di seta stampato a disegni paisley (colori come giacca) girocollo, senza maniche. Pantaloni in velluto di seta stampa paisley (colori come giacca). Linea morbida creata da due pieghe che partono dalla cintura; vita alta; chiusura frontale con zip invisibile e bottone a vista. Scialle quadrato imbottito e impunturato: un lato in raso di seta, stampa a disegno paisley piazzato a foulard e l’altro in velluto di seta con stampa all over. Trapuntatura a disegno floreale .

dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.working_process: Imbottitura e trapuntatura di raso e velluto a stampa paisley abbinati.
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.materials: raso di lana e seta stampa paisley (Ratti Donna, Como art.097/21 dis. F28501 e art. 0105/121 dis. 28501); velluto di seta stampa paisley (Ratti Donna Como art. velluto /21 dis. 59465)

Canotta di linea diritta in raso di seta stampato a disegni paisley (colori come giacca) girocollo, senza maniche. Pantaloni in velluto di seta stampa paisley (colori come giacca). Linea morbida creata da due pieghe che partono dalla cintura; vita alta; chiusura frontale con zip invisibile e bottone a vista. Scialle quadrato imbottito e impunturato: un lato in raso di seta, stampa a disegno paisley piazzato a foulard e l’altro in velluto di seta con stampa all over. Trapuntatura a disegno floreale .
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (scritta oro)
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.working_process: Imbottitura e trapuntatura di raso e velluto a stampa paisley abbinati.
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.materials: raso di lana e seta stampa paisley (Ratti Donna, Como art.097/21 dis. F28501 e art. 0105/121 dis. 28501); velluto di seta stampa paisley (Ratti Donna Como art. velluto /21 dis. 59465)

dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.remark: Reproducing the structural identity of 1940s furs, the uniqueness of both materials and working processes heightens the impact of volumes and gives the coat a special sensation of impalpable lightness. Expressly contrasting the coat's rich proportions is the slinkiness of the figure-flattering dress, second skin mode. Complete with playful glints and glossy tweed effects. All clearly strong on glamorous allure.
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.description: Boxy long-sleeve crewneck 9/10th coat, buttonless. In silk organza with allover application of handcrafted white & black silk jacquard rosebuds, plus inclusion against this thick floral backdrop of feather-tipped black silk organza stalks. Slim body-hugging sleeveless high-neck tube dress, knee length. In silk organza with allover horizontal application of passementerie. This ribbon trim is sewn on with no interruptions, so to allow for the mid-back zip closure it simply switches direction and keeps on going.
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.exhibitions: “Ferré. Abito come accento che esce dal corpo”, area Bernardelli, Mantova, 2015
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.working_process: Two allover applications: one of small handcrafted silk flowers; the other of passementerie, soutache style, sewn on horizontally non-stop (no cuts)
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.materials: White & black birdseye silk jacquard (Stucchi, Como art. 5384/4001 var. 000/4001), silk organza, high sheen “salt & pepper” viscose passementerie

dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.remark: While essentially slim of silhouette, this outfit features an exquisite opulence deriving from the recherché decorative elements – all the richer at waist and wrist level. The short little jacket comes across as a modern-day take on the ones that back in the days of the Second Empire (1852-1870) Charles Worth combined with crinoline style skirts (so giving origin to the contemporary woman’s suit).
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.description: Jacket in white&black micro bird’s-eye silk cady. Short long-sleeve spencer cut. Lavish ripple/spiral salt&pepper silk ribbon embroidery in both flat and twofold appliqué form. Rosebuds in the same basic silk cady all along bottom hem and at wide lower edge of sleeves (diminishing upward here). Dress in black silk velvet. Short, sleeveless, low-cut rectangular neckline. Amphora shape. At midriff, black cady band with horizontal 1 cm parallel topstitching. Gentle gathering at waist.
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.working_process: Soutage & cornely style embroidery of narrow passementerie ribbon; application of small handmade silk flowers
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.materials: White&black bird’s-eye silk jacquard (Stucchi, Como; art. 5384/4001, var. 000/4001), silk cady (Taroni, Como; art. 16691), silk velvet (Redaelli; art. Ivonne super)

dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.remark: Thanks to opulent materials (dazzling crystals, fabulous fur) and artful embroidery/intarsiawork, the classic jacket is all set to hit the Gran Galà scene. The match with ultra mannish glen plaid pants is equally innovative, makes for an authentic conversation piece in the realm of couture.
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.description: Jacket in white&black prince of wales (glen plaid) wool with thick allover embroidery/beading. Short boxy cut. Long sleeves, no fastening. Lavish bas-relief design thanks to mix of different techniques & materials. Natural chinchilla trim. Pants in white&black prince of wales wool. Slim mannish style with tucks, pressed pleat, slant pockets. Ankle length. Bustier top in white silk cady with adhesive element. Vertical construction, (upper) hip skimming. Cummerbund in black silk cady.

dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.remark: The grandeur of this evening cloak enfolds in perfect unison references to typical 1950s shapes & proportions (re: American/European fashion), to the Spanish “manton de torero” and to the Japanese uchikake wedding kimono. Absolutely by design, the cape’s hieratic sumptuousness steals the scene from the exquisitely simple dress underneath.
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.description: Gala evening coat in velvet and peau d’ange color taffeta with fine layer of padding in between. Shawl collar, wide sleeves. Trumpet line with asymmetric bombé hem forming a small train in back. Parallel topstitching in snyc with the circular construction links the three black materials. Dress sleeveless tube style, knee length. Color: black. Vertical construction with allover horizontal 1 cm parallel topstiching.

dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.description: Gala evening coat in velvet and peau d’ange color taffeta with fine layer of padding in between. Shawl collar, wide sleeves. Trumpet line with asymmetric bombé hem forming a small train in back. Parallel topstitching in snyc with the circular construction links the three black materials. Dress sleeveless tube style, knee length. Color: black. Vertical construction with allover horizontal 1 cm parallel topstiching.
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.working_process: Allover parallel topstitching with 1 cm spacing
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.materials: Silk taffeta (Clerici Tessuto, Como; art. 802, var. 1001), silk velvet (Pernet velours, Paris; art. 1112 /111 var 900)

dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.remark: Captivating femininity takes shape on both conceptual and material levels through this shimmering jewel dress in a warm and sensual shade of red. As for the accessories, from torchon jewelry to floral-decor gloves, they are an integral part of the outfit.

dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.remark: Of particular interest is the chiné à la chaine silk (re stole) involving a special dye process where small groups of warp threads are tied in such a way so that they remain color free. The warp is then set on the loom and the weaving takes place with a monochromatic weft. The little shifts that the threads undergo in the curling and tying of the warp create a vertical degradé flame effect.
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.description: Shirt in semi-sheer white silk gazar with extrawide lapel collar. Double breasting, two-button closure at waist. Asymmetric paisley/floral embroidery mimicking lace. Skirt in black silk cady. Slim line, high waist, ankle length. Deep slit at mid back. Belt with buckle in matching fabric. Stole long and rectangular of shape. In chiné silk taffeta with degradé dark red rose design on a black base. Black silk gazar lining, dark red rose appliqués.
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.working_process: White-on-white silk embroidery (by hand) complete with rich relief effect
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.materials: White silk gazar (Taroni, Como), black silk cady (Taroni, Como; art. 16691), chiné à la chaine silk taffeta (Verga, Como; art 3400, var. 40, des. 16872

dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.bibliography:
“Gianfranco Ferré. Lessons in Fasion”, Maria Luisa Frisa (edited by), Marsilio, Venezia, 2009; “The history of modern

dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.remark: While filmmaker Luchino Visconti’s masterpiece “Senso” inspires one part of the collection, this dress captures all the allure of opulent Hapsburgian fashion during the Romantic period. Offsetting the sumptuousness is the modern severity elegance of both monochrome black hue and precision-perfect asymmetry.
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.present_location: FGF space c/o Open Care - Milan
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.description: Black silk gazaar dress with short bustier bodice and trumpet skirt. Two long asymmetric panels at back V neckline draping gently, forming a train. Silk gazar stole hanky style, folded into a triangle, with giant lapel collar attached to it cutting horizontally across the décolleté. Dark red silk velvet & organza rose vine-shoot decor adding to the beauty in back.
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.exhibitions:
“Ferré. Abito come accento che esce dal corpo”, area Bernardelli, Mantova, 2015, “Gianfranco Ferré Designs”, Phoenix Art
Museum, Phoenix, 2015

dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.remark: A main point of interest here is the use of a mannish pinstripe pattern to counterbalance both the magnificence of the delicately voluminous 19th century ballgown style and the exquisite femininity of a skirt complete with beguiling glimpse of the precious layers underneath.
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.present_location: spazio FGF c/o Open Care
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.description: Ball gown consisting of a shaped nylon crinoline skirt, gathered and scalloped at the hem, and then machine embroidered with a pattern to imitate white lace. Starting from the waist of the skirt, 9 tiered pleated nylon tulle flounces are applied at different heights. Over this structure is placed an overskirt composed of two circular skirts: the innermost of ivory-colored mechanical Chantilly lace, and the outermost of black silk gazar with white stripes, imitating pinstripes. Floor length. Separate underskirt composed of a black silk satin pencil skirt, fully doubled (not lined). Belt in black silk grosgrain with covered buckle. Fitted black silk velvet top; edges and straps in black silk tubing; length to the high hip. Square shawl in black silk gazar with white stripes, imitating pinstripes, hand-hemmed.
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.label: Gianfranco Ferré couture (gold lettering)
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.exhibitions: “Gianfranco Ferré Designs”, Phoenix Art Museum, Phoenix, 2015
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.working_process: Sunburst pleating; machine embroidery with white thread on black tulle with a lace effect.
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.materials: Black silk gazar with white stripes (Taroni, Como; art. 9967 var. A); black nylon tulle, various weights; ecru silk Chantilly lace (Moda e guarnizioni, Milan; art. 9111); nylon crinoline; silk velvet (Redaelli velvets, Mandello Lario; art. Yvonne super 54902); black silk satin; black silk grosgrain.

dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.remark: Here too the prime point of interest is the use of intarsiawork silk foulard complete with embroidery for the external layer of the skirt.
dataset_datashack_2026/alta_moda_1988-89.description: Ballgown skirt in voluminous floor length. Exterior layer in six silk print foulards, joined together intarsia mode to form an uninterrupted pattern. Underneath, multiple circular black plisse tulle petticoats (each lifted in front and attached to waist) with lace ribbon trim. Belt in fabric with matching buckle. Top in black silk velvet. Short slim line. Spaghetti straps & piping in black tubular silk. Shawl in silk organza with partial paisley print plus lavish paillette/jet embroidery. Boxy shape.
